---
title: "About Meeval"
---

Detail-oriented Business Analyst with hands-on expertise in **SQL, Power BI, MS Excel and Python** delivering data-driven insights to enhance business efficiency and revenue growth. Skilled communicator with a talent for presenting complex data clearly and concisely to stakeholders across diverse departments.

---

## Education

::: {.edu-cards}

::: {.edu-card}
🎓 **MSc Business Analytics**  
Dublin City University · Dublin, Ireland  
*Sep 2024 – Present*
:::

::: {.edu-card}
🎓 **B.E. IT Engineering** — CGPA 7.49  
Rajagiri School of Engineering & Technology · Kerala, India  
*Nov 2020 – May 2024*
:::

::: {.edu-card}
🎓 **Twelfth** — Score 91.5%  
St. Thomas College HSS · Kerala, India  
*Jun 2018 – Mar 2020*
:::

:::

---

## Training

::: {.callout-note}
### Besant Technologies | Bangalore, India | Sep 2024 – Mar 2025
- Optimized **SQL** queries for scalable performance, achieving a **25% reduction** in data retrieval times.
- Built and automated **Excel** reports utilizing pivot tables, driving **10% productivity gains**.
- Developed interactive **Power BI** dashboards integrating real-time data, boosting operational efficiency by **30%**.
- Proficient in **Python** for data manipulation, cleaning, transformation, and visualization with **Pandas, NumPy & Matplotlib**.
:::

---

## Skills

**Programming Languages**

::: {style="margin:0.5rem 0 1.2rem 0;"}
[SQL]{.skill-tag} [Python]{.skill-tag} [HTML]{.skill-tag} [CSS]{.skill-tag}
:::

**Data Visualization Tools**

::: {style="margin:0.5rem 0 1.2rem 0;"}
[MS Excel]{.skill-tag} [Power BI]{.skill-tag} [DAX]{.skill-tag} [Matplotlib]{.skill-tag} [Pandas]{.skill-tag}
:::

**Soft Skills**

::: {style="margin:0.5rem 0 1.2rem 0;"}
[Decision Making]{.skill-tag} [Critical Thinking]{.skill-tag} [Communication]{.skill-tag} [Teamwork]{.skill-tag} [Adaptability]{.skill-tag}
:::

---

## Certifications

- 🏅 **Data Analytics Training Certification**
- 🏅 **HackerRank SQL Skill Certification**
- 🏅 **Cybersecurity Internship Certificate**
